name: CreateSourceLocationRequest
description: CreateSourceLocationRequest schema from Amazon MediaTailor API

allOf.description: Access configuration parameters. Configures the type of authentication used to access content from your source location.
The optional configuration for the server that serves segments.
A list of the segment delivery configurations associated with this resource.

The tags to assign to the source location. Tags are key-value pairs that you can associate with Amazon resources to help with organization, access control, and cost tracking. For more information, see Tagging AWS Elemental MediaTailor Resources.
